description.value:
A gracefully curved blade forged for speed and precision. Equally effective in one or two hands, the katana rewards disciplined fighters who blend offense with defense.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Versatile d8, Keen
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Versatile d8, Keen â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAdd your proficiency bonus to one-handed Deflect rolls. Two-handed Deflect uses 2d10.
